title: What Is Vibe Coding?
description: A junior dev wants to know if 'vibe coding' is just hype. Walk through the three stages.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Is 'vibe coding' just a fancy word for using ChatGPT to write code?

templates.text: Bigger than that. It's an end-to-end flow from idea to shipped product.
templates.hint_zh: 比那個大。是從想法到出貨的全流程。

templates.text: Three. Find a real need, copy a good design system, then ship with AI helping the code.
templates.hint_zh: 三個。找真需求、抄好的設計系統、再讓 AI 幫忙寫程式出貨。

templates.text: Because consistency is what makes a vibe-coded product feel polished, not stitched together.
templates.hint_zh: 因為一致性才能讓 vibe-coded 產品看起來精緻,不像拼湊的。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Doesn't AI just hallucinate when you let it own the implementation?

templates.text: It will, if you don't anchor it. That's why stage one is structured discovery.
templates.hint_zh: 你不錨定它就會。所以第一步是結構化的需求探索。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sounds like a methodology, not a tool.

templates.text: Exactly. Tools change every six months. The flow is what makes it work.
templates.hint_zh: 正是。工具每半年換一次,真正讓它跑得起來的是流程。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Cool. Got a starter project I can try?

templates.text: Pick one app you wish existed, then run all three stages on it.
templates.hint_zh: 挑一個你希望存在的 app,把三個階段都跑一遍。
